steps.title: Write the dimensions
steps.content: The width is $w$ feet, and the length is $8$ feet longer, so the length is $w+8$.

steps.title: Find the perimeter
steps.content: A rectangle's perimeter is twice the width plus twice the length: $$2w+2(w+8)=2w+2w+16=4w+16$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B (‘$4w + 16$’) is $4w+16$, so B is correct.
